title: 启信慧眼 MCP 授权配置
description: 输入启信Data AI平台的 API Key，用于连接 MCP ，接入企业数据能力。
description_en: Enter the API Key from Qixin Data AI Platform to connect to Qixinhuiyan MCP enterprise data capabilities.
docLabel: 如何获取启信慧眼密钥？
docLabel_en: How to get the API Key from Qixinhuiyan?

fields.label: API Key
fields.placeholder: 请输入启信Data AI平台 API Key
fields.placeholder_en: Enter your Qixin Data AI Platform API Key
fields.description: 前往启信Data AI平台 MCP 接入指南，按照指引获取并复制 API Key，如mcp-xxxx。
fields.description_en: Go to the Qixin Data AI Platform MCP integration guide and follow the instructions to obtain and copy your API Key.
